workplan: Remove time_slot filtering from discovery_agent so valid providers are not excluded
decisions_made: Discovery agent filters by service_type and area only
Time slot filtering moved to ranking_agent availability_match factor
This ensures all valid providers are returned before ranking
errors_encountered: discovery_agent was filtering by time_slot causing P005 Tariq Mahmood to be excluded despite being valid plumber in F-8
Test input: Aaj sham ko plumber chahiye F-8 mein returned 0 providers incorrectly
outcome: Discovery now returns all service+area matched providers. Ranking handles slot scoring.
